assertions.reason: A Bangladesh search state was saved as a named view, persisted in localStorage, and restored after reload with the search query and reduced story counts reapplied immediately.
evidence: Before saving, the home stats were 151 regions / 2,398 stories; after applying search "Bangladesh" they dropped to 3 regions / 6 stories.

Screenshot: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-core/osint-saved-views-export/save-view-dialog-annotated.png shows the Save View dialog while saving the filtered state as "Bangladesh Search View".
localStorage recorded mapr_saved_views with filters.searchQuery="Bangladesh" for the saved view.
After reload, the page returned to an unfiltered state (150 regions / 2,314 stories). Selecting the saved view restored searchValue="Bangladesh" and reduced stats to 3 regions / 5 stories.

Screenshot: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-core/osint-saved-views-export/saved-view-loaded-annotated.png shows the loaded saved view with the Bangladesh search active and the view name displayed in the header.

assertions.reason: The export modal generated a downloadable markdown briefing for the current filtered view, and the downloaded file contained the expected event summary tables and Bangladesh-filtered events.
evidence: Screenshot: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-core/osint-saved-views-export/export-modal-annotated.png shows the Export Briefing modal with Markdown Report, JSON Snapshot, and Print to PDF actions.

The downloaded markdown begins with "# Mapr Intelligence Briefing", reports "Events: 5", and includes summary tables plus Bangladesh-filtered event rows such as "24 killed after bus plunges into Padma River in Bangladesh".

frictions: The initial browser daemon ignored a late --download-path override, so the session was restarted with the same isolated session name and a fixed download directory before the final markdown export was captured.
